title: Data Exfiltration - Large Outbound Transfer to Cloud Storage
raw_evidence: 2025-07-14T21:44:10Z — DLP alert: 4.7 GB outbound transfer from WS-HR-045 to amazonaws.com (bucket: hr-data-backup-ext) over 18 minutes.
2025-07-14T21:44:11Z — Transfer tool: rclone.exe (portable, unsigned) — not in approved software inventory.
2025-07-14T21:44:14Z — rclone.exe process spawned by cmd.exe, parent process: explorer.exe (user-initiated).
2025-07-14T21:44:20Z — Files transferred: 2,341 documents from C:\HR\Compensation\2025 and C:\HR\Investigations\Active.
2025-07-14T21:47:03Z — Destination S3 bucket hr-data-backup-ext is not registered in the corporate cloud asset inventory.
2025-07-14T21:50:22Z — User account: m.jensen — HR Business Partner. Submitted resignation 6 days ago, last day in 4 days.
2025-07-14T21:52:01Z — No prior DLP alerts for m.jensen in the last 12 months.

context.asset_criticality_destination: HIGH — active HR investigations and compensation data
